data.FILE_CONTENT:
<xliff xmlns="urn:oasis:names:tc:xliff:document:1.2" version="1.2">
  <file datatype="plaintext" original="ZETR_TRANSLATIONS_202510" source-language="en-US" target-language="tr">
    <header>
      <tool tool-company="SAP SE" tool-id="urn:x-sap:maintain-translations-fiori-app" tool-name="Maintain Translations Fiori App" tool-version="1.0.0"/>
    </header>
    <body>
      <group datatype="x-DOMAIN" resname="ZETR_D_RESST">
        <trans-unit id="DOMAIN:ZETR_D_RESST:FIXED_VALUE_DESCRIPTION:X" maxwidth="60" size-unit="char">
          <source>Response not required</source>
          <target>Yanıt Gerekmiyor</target>
          <note>Description for fixed value X of domain ZETR_D_RESST.</note>
        </trans-unit>
        <trans-unit id="DOMAIN:ZETR_D_RESST:FIXED_VALUE_DESCRIPTION:0" maxwidth="60" size-unit="char">
          <source>Waiting for response</source>
          <target>Yanıt Bekleniyor</target>
          <note>Description for fixed value 0 of domain ZETR_D_RESST.</note>
        </trans-unit>
        <trans-unit id="DOMAIN:ZETR_D_RESST:FIXED_VALUE_DESCRIPTION:1" maxwidth="60" size-unit="char">
          <source>Rejected</source>
          <target>Reddedildi</target>
          <note>Description for fixed value 1 of domain ZETR_D_RESST.</note>
        </trans-unit>
        <trans-unit id="DOMAIN:ZETR_D_RESST:FIXED_VALUE_DESCRIPTION:2" maxwidth="60" size-unit="char">
          <source>Accepted</source>
          <target>Kabul Edildi</target>
          <note>Description for fixed value 2 of domain ZETR_D_RESST.</note>
        </trans-unit>
        <trans-unit id="DOMAIN:ZETR_D_RESST:FIXED_VALUE_DESCRIPTION:3" maxwidth="60" size-unit="char">
          <source>Response Received</source>
		  <target>Cevap alındı</target>
          <note>Description for fixed value 3 of domain ZETR_D_RESST.</note>
        </trans-unit>
        <trans-unit id="DOMAIN:ZETR_D_RESST:FIXED_VALUE_DESCRIPTION:R" maxwidth="60" size-unit="char">
          <source>Marked as rejected</source>
          <target>Reddedildi Olarak İşaretlendi</target>
          <note>Description for fixed value R of domain ZETR_D_RESST.</note>
        </trans-unit>
        <trans-unit id="DOMAIN:ZETR_D_RESST:FIXED_VALUE_DESCRIPTION:K" maxwidth="60" size-unit="char">
          <source>Rejected via KEP</source>
          <target>KEP Reddi</target>
          <note>Description for fixed value K of domain ZETR_D_RESST.</note>
        </trans-unit>
        <trans-unit id="DOMAIN:ZETR_D_RESST:FIXED_VALUE_DESCRIPTION:G" maxwidth="60" size-unit="char">
          <source>Cancelled via TRA</source>
          <target>GİB İptal</target>
          <note>Description for fixed value G of domain ZETR_D_RESST.</note>
        </trans-unit>
      </group>
    </body>
  </file>
